items.title: 2006-2011 Mercedes C-Class CLK E-Class SLK M272 3.5L V6 Engine 272.970 OEM
items.description:
2006-2011 Mercedes-Benz M272 3.5L V6 Engine (272.970)

This is a complete, tested M272 3.5L V6 engine, part number 272.970, removed from a running 2008 Mercedes-Benz C350 (W204 chassis). This engine is known for its robust performance and was used across various Mercedes-Benz models.

Details

  • Part Number: 272.970
  • Engine Type: M272 3.5L V6
  • Donor Vehicle: 2008 Mercedes-Benz C350 (W204)
  • Condition: Tested and in good working order.

Compatibility

Please verify part number compatibility before purchasing. This engine (272.970) is compatible with the following Mercedes-Benz models:

This is a long block engine. Installation may require transferring accessories (alternator, starter, AC compressor, etc.) from your original engine. Professional installation is highly recommended. Condition

Used - Removed from running vehicle. Inspected and tested.
